details.title: JameZUK AudioMuse-AI Plugin Repository
details.description: Lyrion plugin for AudioMuse-AI sonic similarity, dynamic playlists, alchemy, pathfinding, and admin controls.

plugin.name: AudioMuseAI
plugin.title: AudioMuse-AI
plugin.description: Adds an AudioMuse-AI entry under My Music with sonic similarity, sonic fingerprint, instant text-prompt playlists, mood presets, song alchemy, find path between songs, lyrics-text search, dynamic playlists with auto-extend, and server admin controls. Requires a self-hosted AudioMuse-AI instance.
plugin.creator: JameZUK
